untranslatable_reason: Signal requires a 10-year historical volatility range calculation with dynamic upper/lower percentile bounds. The exact percentile thresholds (percentile_lower_bound and percentile_upper_bound) are marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in the original parameters and are not specified. hvol_20 provides 20-period historical volatility only, not a 10-year anchored range. A proper implementation would require custom pre-calculated fields for the 10-year historical volatility min/max bounds.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses hvol_20 (20-period historical volatility) with bounds of 0.10-0.30 (10%-30%) as inferred from source text, but this is a simplified proxy. The original signal requires anchoring to a 10-year realized volatility range, which cannot be expressed with the available indicators without pre-computed historical bounds. Position scaling logic ('reduce position if forecast near bounds') cannot be expressed in this rule format.
